title: pedicularis curvituba subsp. curvituba
intro:
Pedicularis curvituba subsp. curvituba, also known as the curved lousewort, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pedicularis curvituba subsp. curvituba include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
